productName: J-HR-100SBJ - Journeyman Hash Strawberry Jellies (100mg THC)
description: Handcrafted sweet, juicy strawberry gummies inspired by old-world confectionery, where bright fruit purée, glossy sugar, and a silky cannabis infusion come together in one irresistible chew. It features THC for a classic euphoric lift. Expect a smooth sativa edible experience — give it time to bloom before taking more.
